response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior software developer, which exceeds the entry-level requirement of the job. While they have relevant skills such as TypeScript proficiency and experience with REST APIs, their seniority and past roles may not align with the junior/mid-level position.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript and other relevant technologies
Experience with full-stack development and various tech stacks
Strong background in software development with multiple projects and contributions
concerns: Significantly more experienced than the role requires, potentially leading to higher salary expectations or boredom with junior tasks
Most experience is as a senior or staff engineer, not aligning with the junior/mid-level position
Some technologies mentioned are not directly relevant to the job description
